# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
- name: vm-instance
  type: compute.v1.instance
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: zones/us-central1-a/machineTypes/f1-micro
    disks:
    - deviceName: boot
      type: PERSISTENT
      boot: true
      autoDelete: true
      initializeParams:
        sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/debian-9-stretch-v20170918
    networkInterfaces:
    - network: global/networks/default

- name: sql-instance
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    region: us-central
    settings:
      tier: db-f1-micro
      dataDiskSizeGb: 10
      activationPolicy: ALWAYS

- name: sql-db
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.database
  properties:
    instance: $(ref.sql-instance.name)
    name: my-database

- name: my-storage
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: my-storage-bucket

- name: http-health-check
  type: compute.v1.httpHealthCheck
  properties:
    name: http-health-check
    requestPath: /
    port: 80

- name: backend-service
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    healthChecks:
    - $(ref.http-health-check.selfLink)
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL
    backends:
    - group: zones/us-central1-a/instanceGroups/default-pool

- name: url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    name: url-map
    defaultService: $(ref.backend-service.selfLink)

- name: http-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.url-map.selfLink)

- name: forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    target: $(ref.http-proxy.selfLink)
    portRange: 80
    IPProtocol: TCP
